fixes.label: Scope session + nuclear restart with summary

scenarios.title: The 30-turn fade
scenarios.transcript: A 30-turn architecture conversation. Turn 3 contains HARD CONSTRAINT: 90-day retention. By turn 25 the proposed design uses 30-day retention. No intermediate turns restate the constraint.

scenarios.title: The 4-dump session
scenarios.transcript: A 15-turn session contains four full tool-output dumps (schema registry, cost spreadsheet, Debezium docs, DLQ blog-post compilation) totaling ~27k tokens. The model's final answer misses a constraint stated once, early.

scenarios.title: The PII leak
scenarios.transcript: A user pastes a CSV containing customer names, emails, and phone numbers to ask about a data model. The model's output example uses those real names and emails verbatim. Logs show the data was sent upstream.

scenarios.title: The two-topic tangle
scenarios.transcript: A session mixes a billing-bug fix and a new feature design. The model keeps applying constraints from one to the other; every response conflates the two concerns.
